docs:full.label: Generate Documentation
docs:full.description: Create, draft, review, and verify all project documentation.

docs:release.label: Lock Documentation
docs:release.description: Verify and lock docs so they're ready for app scaffolding or handoff.

app:full.label: Build Application
app:full.description: Scaffold, build, and test the application from locked docs.

system:full.label: Full Pipeline (End-to-End)
system:full.description: Run everything: generate docs, lock them, scaffold and build the app, then deploy and package.

system:import.label: Import Existing Project
system:import.description: Analyze an existing codebase and generate documentation from it.

export:package.label: Export Agent Kit
export:package.description: Package the locked documentation and artifacts into a downloadable ZIP.

foundation.label: Foundation Layer
foundation.description: Boundaries, runtime assumptions, and API/contract foundation.

core-spec.label: Core Spec Layer
core-spec.description: Stabilize contracts, schema, and identity early to reduce downstream rework.

web-only.label: Web App (Module Only)
web-only.description: Only touch frontend/state modules; will block if prereqs missing.

mobile-only.label: Mobile (Module Only)
mobile-only.description: Only touch the mobile module; will block if prereqs missing.

desktop-only.label: Desktop (Module Only)
desktop-only.description: Only touch the desktop module; will block if prereqs missing.

backend-only.label: Backend (Module Only)
backend-only.description: Only touch backend module; will block if prereqs missing.

fullstack-web.label: Fullstack Web
fullstack-web.description: End-to-end web: UI + state + backend + end-to-end integration.

cross-platform-app.label: Cross-Platform App
cross-platform-app.description: Mobile + web clients sharing backend/contract foundations.

api-contracts.label: API Contracts
api-contracts.description: Define API surface, schemas/types, error model, versioning.

contracts-only.label: Contracts (Module Only)
contracts-only.description: Only touch contracts module; will block if prereqs missing.

database-schema.label: Database Schema
database-schema.description: Schema, migrations, constraints, indexing, retention, backup/DR.

database-only.label: Database (Module Only)
database-only.description: Only touch database module; will block if prereqs missing.

identity-access.label: Identity & Access
identity-access.description: Identity model, authn/authz, permissions, critical flows.

auth-only.label: Auth (Module Only)
auth-only.description: Only touch auth module; will block if prereqs missing.

integrations.label: Integrations
integrations.description: Third-party providers, creds, webhooks, failure modes, data handling.

integrations-only.label: Integrations (Module Only)
integrations-only.description: Only touch integrations module; will block if prereqs missing.

state-model.label: State Model
state-model.description: State domains, update patterns, persistence/hydration, edge cases.

state-only.label: State (Module Only)
state-only.description: Only touch state module; will block if prereqs missing.

data-platform.label: Data Platform
data-platform.description: Data sources, transforms, quality, lineage, access/governance.

analytics.label: Analytics Layer
analytics.description: Analytics-focused data modeling and metrics definitions.

security-layer.label: Security Layer
security-layer.description: Threat model, security policies, vuln mgmt, incident response, supply chain.

security-only.label: Security (Module Only)
security-only.description: Only touch security module; will block if prereqs missing.

ops.label: Ops Stack
ops.description: DevOps + cloud + devex: pipelines, environments, observability, runbooks, tooling.

cloud-runtime.label: Cloud Runtime
cloud-runtime.description: Cloud topology, IAM, compute/runtime, storage, DR, cost controls.

release-engineering.label: Release Engineering
release-engineering.description: CI/CD, rollout/rollback, environment promotion rules, runbooks.

developer-experience.label: Developer Experience
developer-experience.description: Local dev, tooling, docs standards, workflow conventions, dev support.

quality-light.label: Quality (Light)
quality-light.description: Minimal population for testing/quality docs (owners, intended gates, placeholders).

quality-deep.label: Quality (Deep)
quality-deep.description: Full testing strategy + automation + CI gates (pairs naturally with DevOps).

docs-pass.label: Docs Pass
docs-pass.description: Review + verify across all modules (no drafting).

prelock.label: Pre-Lock Readiness
prelock.description: Run full readiness loop (generate→seed→draft→review→verify), stop before lock.

release.label: Release (Verify + Lock)
release.description: Verify must PASS; then lock (ERC generation).

draft.message: draft blocked unless seed complete for target module(s)

lock.message: lock refused unless latest verify is PASS

scaffold-app.message: scaffold-app blocked unless docs are locked (or explicit override 'dev_build')

deploy.message: deploy blocked unless tests PASS (or explicit override)
